summary_one_line: Profile PCS FOURCC at offset 0x14 must equal 'Lab ' (cmsSigLabData) so the Lab-trilinear path calls ChangeInterpolationToTrilinear and reaches the false-side CLUT check.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte profile-connection-space (PCS) FOURCC at input offsets 0x14-0x17 must be the literal 'Lab ' (0x4c 0x61 0x62 0x20). cmsGetPCS returns cmsSigLabData only for that exact tag, gating the call to ChangeInterpolationToTrilinear at cmsio1.c:776/624, which is the only path that executes the blocker line 526.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every winner-resolving seed carries 'Lab' at offsets 0x14-0x16 (4c 61 62), supplied by the value_profile_cmplog winner; the BYTE DIFF shows these three offsets are concentrated to a single W value distinct from the L value, exactly the exact-equality FOURCC the cmsGetPCS==cmsSigLabData gate requires.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: The loser-blocking seeds (value_profile) hold 'XYZ' (58 59 5a) at offsets 0x14-0x16, so cmsGetPCS returns cmsSigXYZData, line 775's equality fails, ChangeInterpolationToTrilinear is never called, and the blocker false side at line 526 is never reached (loser resolved=0/10, blocked=10).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile. The cmsGetPCS check compares the input's 0x14-0x17 word against the constant cmsSigLabData ('Lab '); cmplog logs that comparison and I2SRandReplace splices the logged 'Lab ' literal directly into the input bytes, flipping 'XYZ'->'Lab ' in one step. value_profile's CMP_MAP only buckets Hamming distance and cannot synthesize the exact 4-byte FOURCC, so it stays blocked.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the false side of the CLUT-type check, reached only inside ChangeInterpolationToTrilinear.
ChangeInterpolationToTrilinear is only called when the profile PCS equals cmsSigLabData.
Winner seeds carry 'Lab' at offsets 0x14-0x16 while loser seeds carry 'XYZ'.
The 0x15 and 0x16 offsets confirm the 'ab' vs 'YZ' split completing 'Lab ' vs 'XYZ '.
A winner-resolving seed contains the ASCII 'Lab ' string at the PCS offset.
A loser-blocking seed contains 'XYZ' at the PCS offset and is RGB->XYZ.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace while value_profile does not.
value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator, only Hamming/prefix CMP_MAP feedback.
The winner resolves 9/10 trials while the loser is blocked in all 10.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
winner: resolved=9/10  blocked=1  unreached=0
  loser:  resolved=0/10  blocked=10  unreached=0

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2179 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 25df1685ae4b07fe` and observed 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 16 of the 17-level ancestor chain — the ParentInfo-only signal characteristic of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating a downstream branch on an exact 4-byte FOURCC equality where value_profile resolves it as often as value_profile_cmplog within the same time budget, showing CMP_MAP Hamming feedback alone suffices and I2S substitution is not the differentiator.

weakest_evidence_point: The attribution assumes value_profile's CMP_MAP cannot incrementally climb the 4-byte 'Lab ' FOURCC via Hamming buckets, but a slow gradient climb (rather than a hard inability) could also explain the 9-vs-0 gap within the time budget.
